title: No convention governs substrate bootstrap-state provisioning + substrate-identity reconciliation
description: No convention governs how substrate bootstrap-state is provisioned and how substrate-identity is reconciled on init/switch. Decisions in this domain (DEC-0001 skeleton-config bootstrap, DEC-0003 switch register-if-absent reconciliation) were made without a governing convention.

evidence.reference: conventions block has no rule covering substrate bootstrap-state / identity-lifecycle

impact: Bootstrap/identity-lifecycle decisions are ungoverned — no checked rule constrains future decisions of this kind.
proposed_resolution: Author a convention governing substrate bootstrap-state + identity reconciliation; re-point DEC-0001/DEC-0003 from item_acknowledges_missing_convention to item_governed_by_convention; close this gap.
